data.question: Is the following statement true or false? Projects help programs to achieve its aims.
data.feedback_correct: True! A program is a collection of projects and it is these projects that help programs to be successful.

data.question: Is the following statement true or false? Capital grants can also be used for operations.
data.feedback_correct: False! Capital grants are specifically for capital projects such as purchasing or renovating buildings. They may also be used for large equipment or building materials — not general operations.

data.question: Is the following statement true or false? General operating grants are always restricted.
data.feedback_correct: False! As a matter of fact, most operating grants are unrestricted. It is important to be clear on the restrictions around the grant with the grant maker.

data.question: Is the following statement true or false? Reporting after receiving funding is not very important.
data.feedback_correct: False! It is very important to report to the funder on how you have utilized their funds and the impact achieved. You should also report to the community you serve, perhaps during your annual general meeting.
